column1: # Source: Beckhoff EL5xxx.xml lines ~106671-113000, RevisionNo 0x00100000 entry
# Role: secondary (load-side) position feedback for dual-loop motion control.
#       Pairs with ClearPath-EC - both DC-sync at AssignActivate=0x300, so their
#       TxPDO samples are captured at the same SYNC0 instant.
#   CoE mailbox: SdoInfo, PdoAssign, PdoConfig, CompleteAccess (from ESI),
#   FMMUs: Inputs, MBoxState (no Outputs FMMU - input-only terminal)
#   Default TxPDO pair (TwinCAT AlternativeSmMapping): 2 Ch. Standard
# === PDO assignments (TxPDOs only; no RxPDOs on this terminal) ===
# slave sm  dir pdo    entry    sub  bits pin                    type
# Channel 1 config block lives at 0x8000; Channel 2 at 0x8010.
# Values below are ESI DefaultData; override per encoder datasheet.

column6: Ch1 Disable Status Bits = 0 (keep status in PDO)
Ch1 Multiturn bit count - SET FROM ENCODER DATASHEET
Ch1 Singleturn bit count - SET FROM ENCODER DATASHEET
Ch2 Multiturn bit count - SET FROM ENCODER DATASHEET
Ch2 Singleturn bit count - SET FROM ENCODER DATASHEET

column1: # index sub bits typ access default note

column8: Revision (lower word = minor, upper word = major)
Diagnosis History entry count (see ESI DiagMessages)
Ch1 Input cycle counter (advance each valid read)
SM2 Output Shift Time (ns) - N/A, no outputs
SM3 Input Shift Time (ns) - subtract to get true sample instant
